assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures AddJwtBearer with Authority set to the IdentityServer URL
assertions.rationale: Standard JWT Bearer setup, well documented

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets MapInboundClaims = false on the JWT Bearer handler
assertions.rationale: Reasonably known in the community, most guides mention this

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets TokenValidationParameters with NameClaimType = 'name' and RoleClaimType = 'role'
assertions.rationale: Without skill guidance, an LLM might not think to set these explicitly, especially pairing them with MapInboundClaims=false

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets Audience or ValidAudience to 'catalog-api'
